narrative:
Cols 87-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,386 registered voters, with 68.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.5 percentage points.
